items.content_statement: Describe a range of emotions and understand that people can have more than one emotion at a time
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about emotions that can be assessed through explanation

items.content_statement: Describe how emotions can change depending on the situation
items.classification_rationale: Conceptual understanding of situational emotion variation that can be assessed through explanation

items.content_statement: Recognize how their interests and personal strengths support their learning
items.classification_rationale: Analytical skill deployed when reflecting on learning connections - occasion-triggered capability

items.content_statement: Describe the characteristics of a growth mindset
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about growth mindset characteristics that can be assessed through explanation

items.content_statement: Build a growth mindset when facing a challenge in order to recognize and build upon their strengths
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation of maintaining growth mindset across challenging contexts - enacted over time
prerequisite_lts: Describe the characteristics of a growth mindset

items.content_statement: Evaluate ways they currently express emotions as either kind or unkind
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when reflecting on emotional expression - requires reasoning quality assessment

items.content_statement: Recognize when they are having strong emotions and use different strategies to self-regulate and respond to difficult situations
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation of emotional self-regulation enacted across contexts over time

items.content_statement: Develop short-term goals and create a simple plan that helps them be successful academically and/or personally
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear steps and criteria for goal-setting and planning

items.content_statement: Evaluate how their attitude affects goal achievement
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability requiring reasoning about causal relationships between attitude and outcomes

items.content_statement: Demonstrate the appropriate time, place, and manner to respectfully advocate for their needs
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability requiring contextual reasoning about appropriate advocacy strategies

items.content_statement: Describe and use courage and perseverance to overcome a challenging situation
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation of courage and perseverance enacted across contexts over time

items.content_statement: Develop an understanding and appreciation of different abilities, backgrounds, cultures and social groups
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about diversity that must be understood - Type 1 conceptual content

items.content_statement: Respectfully understand that others can have different thoughts and feelings
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about individual differences that must be understood - Type 1 conceptual content

items.content_statement: Understand how stereotypes can be harmful
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about the effects of stereotypes - Type 1 conceptual content

items.content_statement: Explain the importance of having empathy for others and their perspectives
items.classification_rationale: Analytical skill requiring reasoning about empathy across multiple contexts - Type 2 occasion-triggered capability

items.content_statement: Practice gratitude
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation that operates by default across contexts - Type 3 dispositional capacity

items.content_statement: Identify a need in our classroom or school community and discuss possible solutions
items.classification_rationale: Analytical skill requiring reasoning about community needs and solutions - Type 2 occasion-triggered capability

items.content_statement: Develop relationships based on interests, strengths, and personal values
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - developing relationships is an ongoing enacted capacity across contexts

items.content_statement: Identify different roles in group work and advocate for their role as well as for the inclusion of others
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical skill - deployed when group work situations arise

items.content_statement: Demonstrate positive and respectful communication through word choice, and body language
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - positive communication is an ongoing enacted capacity across contexts

items.content_statement: Demonstrate positive communication skills, including using technology, and understand the potential impact of words and actions on relationships
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - communication skills deployed in specific contexts with understanding of impact

items.content_statement: Practice resolving conflicts with peers independently and/or with adult support
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - conflict resolution deployed when conflicts arise

items.content_statement: Approach conflict resolution with an open mind
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - open-minded approach is an ongoing enacted capacity across conflict situations

items.content_statement: Determine what is within and outside of their control and influence when facing a problem or challenge
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when a problem situation arises - Type 2

items.content_statement: Use a decision-making process to generate both short- and long-term solutions to a challenge or situation
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when facing a challenge - Type 2

items.content_statement: Explore the possible outcomes of a variety of choices and decisions
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when considering decisions - Type 2

items.content_statement: Reflect on personal behaviors and choices and identify what was helpful versus harmful
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when reflecting on past actions - Type 2

items.content_statement: Describe what they have learned about themselves when helping others in our school, home, and community
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when reflecting on service experiences - Type 2

items.content_statement: Recognize social norms with respect to safety self and others and reflect on the impact that personal choices have on academic, physical, and emotional well-being
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when evaluating choices against norms and consequences - Type 2
